title: TheTitansNeo
description: ​This project is an unofficial remaster mod for TheTitans.​
body:
## Information:

1.  This is an unofficial remaster of TheTitans mod for modern Minecraft versions.
2.  Modified the recipes of some items, such as Creepy Wither Doll and RNG Relinquisher, which need to be found in End City chests.

## Features:

*   Powerful mobs,can kill create mode.
*   Powerful weapons,tools and armor.
*   More gold food and diamond food.
